# mailu_domain (Data Source)

Reads a Mailu domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mailu_domain" "example" {
  name = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `alternatives` (Set of String)
- `comment` (String)
- `dns_autoconfig` (List of String)
- `dns_dkim` (String)
- `dns_dmarc` (String)
- `dns_dmarc_report` (String)
- `dns_mx` (String)
- `dns_spf` (String)
- `dns_tlsa` (List of String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `managers` (Set of String)
- `max_aliases` (Number)
- `max_quota_bytes` (Number)
- `max_users` (Number)
- `signup_enabled` (Boolean)
